<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/forecastingUnit/{forecastingUnitId}/withPrograms"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve a forecasting unit and its associated supply plan and forecasting programs (active and disabled).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}

>
